subcodes.first_line: The Mystery of God was hidden behind the veils by the Most Great Symbol in this secret that is concealed in mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سر الله قد کان عن خلف الاستار بالرمز الاکبر فی هذا المستسر المقنع بالسر قد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
